info.description: Provider-neutral HTTP and server-sent-events API for running agent turns, reading retained messages, resolving tool decisions, and managing subagents.
info.title: AgentCLI HTTP API

get.description: Returns successfully when the agent HTTP server is available.

post.description: Answers a tool-authored informational Yes/No confirmation. This is independent of permission policy.

put.description: Changes live tool permission evaluation and emits a permission-mode event.

get.summary: List subagents owned by a parent session

post.summary: Create and asynchronously start a subagent
Resolve a tool confirmation for an owned subagent

get.description: Reading for UI rendering does not mark child activity as observed by the parent model.

post.summary: Resolve a tool permission for an owned subagent

post.description: Starts a turn when the child is idle or queues the message in its mailbox while busy. An immediately started turn can be streamed with Accept: text/event-stream.

get.description: Replays retained child-turn events after the cursor, then continues with live EventResponse envelopes.
get.summary: Stream retained and live subagent turn events

parameters.description: Resume after this event sequence when after is omitted
parameters.name: Last-Event-ID

200.description: One SSE data payload; the HTTP response remains open for more events

post.description: Only the child turn currently active may be interrupted. The body is optional.

get.description: Replays and follows every root turn in a session, including queued lifecycle records and parent turns created automatically from subagent callbacks. The session cursor is independent from each runtime event sequence.
get.summary: Stream retained and live session activity

parameters.description: Resume after this session cursor when after is omitted
parameters.name: Last-Event-ID

200.description: One SSE data payload; the HTTP response remains open for more records

get.description: Returns the provider-neutral transcript, including user, assistant, tool-call, and tool-result messages.

post.description: Starts immediately when the session is idle or queues FIFO when another turn is active. Send Accept: text/event-stream to stream an admitted turn instead of receiving JSON.
post.summary: Start or queue a root agent turn

get.summary: Read root turn status and result

get.description: Replays events after the supplied cursor, then continues with live events. The SSE event ID is the event sequence.
get.summary: Stream retained and live root turn events

parameters.description: Resume after this event sequence when after is omitted
parameters.name: Last-Event-ID

200.description: One SSE data payload; the HTTP response remains open for more events

post.description: Cancels a queued turn before admission or requests interruption of an active turn. The body is optional.

get.description: Returns safe discovery metadata. Local paths and private instructions are omitted.

message.description: User message for the new turn.
